kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

test.name: Passenger Can Submit Report Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การเดินทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูลการเดินทาง...
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()='รายงานปัญหา']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//h3[normalize-space()='รายงานปัญหาการเดินทาง']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select' by value DANGEROUS_DRIVING.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ทดสอบรายงานปัญหาโดยระบบ automation ผ่านแน่นอน' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder='กรอกรายละเอียดปัญหา...']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder='กรอกรายละเอียดปัญหา...']
ทดสอบรายงานปัญหาโดยระบบ automation ผ่านแน่นอน
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()='ส่งรายงาน']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains

kw.arg: ส่งรายงานสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

test.doc: Passenger รายงานปัญหา กรอกครบ แล้วส่งสำเร็จ

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
